summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM Marketing Control Panel UI and backend integration. All marketing endpoints have full UI implementation with 4 functional tabs (Overview, Campaigns, Automation, History). Backend APIs working correctly with version 2.0.0 confirmed.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 201 instead of expected 200 status code
minor_issues.impact: Test expects 200 but gets 201 - functionality works but status code mismatch

minor_issues.issue: Actions fail with 'API call failed or no campaign ID' when Meta Ads not configured
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - Meta Ads API not configured so actions cannot execute

passed_tests: Marketing Control Panel page loads at /admin/marketing
Overview tab shows ROI Summary with Total Spend, Total Profit, Overall ROI
Campaigns tab shows table with Scale/Kill action buttons
Automation tab shows Auto Mode toggle and settings (max actions, budget change, min spend)
History tab shows action history table with 2 records
Sidebar has Marketing section with Analytics and Marketing Control links
API GET /api/marketing/status returns version 2.0.0 with all features
API GET /api/marketing/auto/config returns auto mode configuration
API GET /api/marketing/roi?days=30 returns campaigns with ROI data
Scale/Kill buttons are clickable and trigger API calls
Auto Mode settings can be modified and saved
All 4 tabs (Overview, Campaigns, Automation, History) are functional
Meta Ads status correctly shows 'Not Configured' with setup instructions
